CREATE CLASS TestClass AS METHOD java_call_method(INT);
CREATE CLASS AnotherTestClass AS METHOD java_call_method(STRING);
CREATE CLASS StaticTestClass AS METHOD static_java_call_method(DOUBLE);
SELECT * FROM TestClass WHERE java_call_method(instance_obj => TestClass, parameters => (1)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM AnotherTestClass WHERE java_call_method(instance_obj => NULL, parameters => ('test')) = 'test';
CREATE TABLE MethodResults (id INT, result STRING);
INSERT INTO MethodResults SELECT 1, java_call_method(instance_obj => TestClass, parameters => (1));
INSERT INTO MethodResults SELECT 2, java_call_method(instance_obj => NULL, parameters => (3.14));
SELECT id, result FROM MethodResults WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
WITH MethodCall AS (SELECT java_call_method(instance_obj => TestClass, parameters => (1)) AS result) SELECT * FROM MethodCall WHERE result LIKE 'result%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MethodResults WHERE result = 'expected_value';
